task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Rate-Limited API** (Level 7)

Build any CRUD API with rate limiting. POST /api/items creates items (name required). GET /api/items lists all. Apply rate limiting: max 5 requests per minute. The 6th request within a minute should return 429.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Items table:
  name, required

# Your endpoints here
# Hint: rate limit 5 per minute

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/items with body {"name
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Items table:
  name, required

create a RequestLogs table:
  ip_address
  request_time_date
  request_count (number), default 1

when user calls POST /api/items sending item:
  set client_ip to request's ip
  set now to current time
  set cutoff_time to now - 60
  set recent_logs to get every RequestLog where ip_address is client_ip
  
  set total_requests to 0
  for each log in recent_logs:
    if log's request_time_date is greater than cutoff_time:
      set total_requests to total_requests + log's request_count
  
  if total_requests is greater than 5:
    send back { error: 'Rate limit exceeded' } with status 429
  else:
    validate item:
      name is text, required
    set log_entry to {ip_address: client_ip, request_time_date: now, request_count: 1}
    save log_entry to RequestLogs
    saved = save item to Items
    send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/items:
  set client_ip to request's ip
  set now to current time
  set cutoff_time to now - 60
  set recent_logs to get every RequestLog where ip_address is client_ip
  
  set total_requests to 0
  for each log in recent_logs:
    if log's request_time_date is greater than cutoff_time:
      set total_requests to total_requests + log's request_count
  
  if total_requests is greater than 5:
    send back { error: 'Rate limit exceeded' } with status 429
  else:
    set log_entry to {ip_address: client_ip, request_time_date: now, request_count: 1}
    save log_entry to RequestLogs
    send back all Items
